verses.translation: And My mercy encompasses all things.

verses.arabic: قُلْ يَا عِبَادِيَ الَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا عَلَىٰ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَا تَقْنَطُوا مِن رَّحْمَةِ اللَّهِ
verses.transliteration: Qul ya 'ibadiyalladhina asrafu 'ala anfusihim la taqnatu min rahmatillah
verses.translation: Say, 'O My servants who have transgressed against themselves, do not despair of the mercy of Allah.'
Indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate.
Indeed, with hardship comes ease.

verses.transliteration: Wasbir wa ma sabruka illa billah
verses.translation: And be patient, for your patience is only through Allah.

verses.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا اسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ
verses.translation: O you who believe, seek help through patience and prayer.

verses.arabic: إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى الصَّابِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
verses.translation: Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account.
Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth.
Guide us to the straight path.

verses.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.translation: This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for the God-conscious.

verses.arabic: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا
verses.transliteration: Wa man yattaqillaha yaj'al lahu makhraja
verses.translation: And whoever fears Allah, He will make a way out for him.
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you [in favor].

verses.arabic: وَإِن تَعُدُّوا نِعْمَةَ اللَّهِ لَا تُحْصُوهَا
verses.transliteration: Wa in ta'uddu ni'matallahi la tuhsuha
verses.translation: And if you should count the favors of Allah, you could not enumerate them.

verses.arabic: فَاذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِي وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ
verses.transliteration: Fadhkuruni adhkurkum washkuru li wa la takfurun
verses.translation: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.

verses.transliteration: Wa kulu washrabu wa la tusrifu
verses.translation: And eat and drink, but do not be excessive.

verses.arabic: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَكَفَىٰ بِاللَّهِ وَكِيلًا
verses.transliteration: Wa tawakkal 'alallahi wa kafa billahi wakila
verses.translation: And rely upon Allah, and sufficient is Allah as Disposer of affairs.

verses.arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
verses.translation: And whoever relies upon Allah, then He is sufficient for him.
Sufficient for us is Allah, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.
And Allah is the best of providers.
